case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS BARRERAS SANTOS DBA 445 TEHAMA ST. APTS. et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
